appliedUpdates.description: Added API error handling pattern and account page error state UI pattern documentation to architecture.md

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: The marketplace-worker skill procedure says to use agent-browser for verification (step 5), but test-only/refactoring features have no interactive flows to verify. The skill could note that browser verification can be skipped for pure test/code quality features and this should not be logged as a deviation.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: misc-quality-polish-1 is a test-only quality polish feature. Worker correctly skipped browser verification since there are no user-visible flow changes, but the skill procedure doesn't explicitly allow this.
